approved.title: Sunrise Glass at La Caravelle
approved.content: Perfect 2-3ft glassy waves this morning at La Caravelle. Offshore wind, warm water, empty lineup. Does it get any better?
approved.creator: @gwadasurfer

approved.title: The Ocean Heals Everything
approved.content: When life gets heavy, the ocean reminds you to float. A reminder to all surfers out there — take a deep breath and paddle out.
approved.creator: @soulsurfer

approved.title: Immersion in Guadeloupe Islands: Surf & Encounters with Vaimiti Teiefitu
approved.content: A surf film from the heart of Guadeloupe Islands based on its own people.   Chapters : 0:00 Intro 01:35 Surf with Alix Dulac at Anse-Bertrand 02:17 Meeting Virginie Cabre 03:52 A Surf at Le Moule with Thomas Debierre 06:40 Sunset Surf ar Anse Bertrand with Anna Danielou 07:08 Meeting Cyril Villoing 07:46 A rainy surf in Port-Louis 08:06 Full moon from la pointe de la Grande Vigie 08:15 One last surf in Port-Louis 09:25 Outro 10:05 Credits  Starring Vaimiti Teiefitu With Alix Dulac, Virginie Cabre, Thomas Debierre & Cyril Villoing Directed filmed & edited by Simon Levalois-Bazer Produced by ‪@ilesdeGuadeloupe‬ ‪@GuadeloupeIslands‬
approved.creator: @vaimititeiefitu,‎⁨@ilesdeGuadeloupe

approved.title: LANMÈ - Full Movie
approved.content: LANMÈ - The Caribbean surf culture in motion | Starring Vaimiti  Traveling across the Atlantic from Tahiti to Guadeloupe, our teamrider Vai discovers an island that feels unexpectedly familiar, where island culture echoes her own. Through stories of heritage, fear, and love for the ocean, the film explores the island’s evolving relationship with the sea. It celebrates a culture in motion—where tradition meets change, and the waves become a space for connection, freedom, and joy.
approved.creator: @ProtestMovieChannel

rejected.content: Just me and the sunrise at Le Moule. Offshore wind, 3ft and glassy. This is why we live here.
